Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protectyour information.This does not coverany collection, use or disclosure by third parties through any of ourapplications, products or services Web sites that we do not control or own andany third party features or services made available via an Application.

decoder_heading: What Information We Use and How We Use It
ident_heading:
What information we
use and how we use it
heading_content_part: What information weuse and how we use it:
1.  Read yourcontactsShamiTech Apps doesnot save or upload your contacts. Permission to access contact information isused when you search contacts in ShamiTech Apps search bar.
2.  Takepictures and videosThis permissionallows ShamiTech Apps to use your device’s camera to take photos / videos andturn ON/OFF Camera Flash. We do not save or upload your photos/videos.

3.  Approximatelocation (network-based)This permissionallows ShamiTech Apps to identify and display your location on map or appsinstalled by anonymous surrounding users and to recommend popular apps based onusers’ location. This information is untraceable.

4.  Read phonestatus and identityThis permissionallows ShamiTech Appsto recognizean incoming/outgoing call and to switch between the User System interface andcall interface or announces/shows the caller name while some one is calling,you will identify it without looking to your smart phone.

decoder_heading: 5. Read your text messages (SMS or MMS)
ident_heading:
5.  Read your
text messages (SMS or MMS
heading_content_part: 5.  Read yourtext messages (SMS or MMS)We do not save orupload your messages. We use this permission to read your text messages whenyou search messages in search bar or announce the sender name while some one issend you a message, you will identify it without looking to your smart phone.

decoder_heading: 6. Modify or delete the contents of your USB storage
ident_heading:
6.  Modify or
delete the contents of your USB storag
heading_content_part: 6.  Modify ordelete the contents of your USB storageThis permissionallows ShamiTech Apps to delete app data (image, text, audio etc..) stored ontheir SD card.

7.  Findaccounts on the devicesShamiTech Apps doesnot recognize or save your account information for any programs. ShamiTech Appsonly detects whether users have a Google account linked with the device whichhelps us confirm the state of Google Service and provide users with appropriateapplication download and update methods.

decoder_heading: 8. Read calendar events plus confidential information
ident_heading:
8.  Read calendar
events plus confidential informatio
heading_content_part: 8.  Read calendarevents plus confidential informationThis information isused only in the ShamiTech Apps to remind you of your latest calendar events.We do not save or upload any of your calendar information.

decoder_heading: 9. Read the contents of your USB storage
ident_heading:
9.  Read the
contents of your USB storag
heading_content_part: 9.  Read thecontents of your USB storageThis permissionallows ShamiTech Apps to view app data (image, text, audio etc..) stored ontheir SD card.
10.  Read Googleservice configurationThis information isused to acquire advertising ID. ShamiTech Apps provide users with betteradvertising service by using such anonymous ID.
11.  Changenetwork connectivityThis permission isused in ShamiTech Apps settings and notification toolbar, in order tochange/check network connectivity.
12.  Connect anddisconnect from Wi-FiThis permission isused in ShamiTech Apps settings and notification toolbar in order to connectand disconnect from Wi-Fi.
13.  Set analarmThis permissionallows users to access the device's alarm through ShamiTech Apps clock widget.
14.  Fullnetwork accessThis permission isused to access the device’s network for certain functions including receivingupdate notifications or accessing app classification labels.
15.  Viewnetwork connectionsThis permission isused in ShamiTech Apps settings and notification toolbar, in order to viewnetwork connections.
16.  View Wi-FiconnectionsThis permission isused in ShamiTech Apps settings and notification toolbar, in order to viewWi-Fi connections.
17.  AccessBluetooth settingsThis permission isused in ShamiTech Apps settings, in order to turn on and off the Bluetooth.
18.  Pair withBluetooth devicesThis permissionis used in ShamiTech Apps settings, in order to pair with Bluetooth devices.
19.  Close otherappsThis permission isused in ShamiTech Apps Boost in order to turn off the back-end apps and makethe phone run faster.
20.  Retrieverunning appsThis permission isused in ShamiTech Apps Boost in order to view the running apps.
21.  Run asstartupShamiTech Apps willrun as startup to provide users with a launcher service.
22.  Control vibrationThis permissionallows ShamiTech Apps to make the phone vibrate once after users set the deviceon vibrate, confirming the setting has been turned on.
23.  Adjust yourwallpaper sizeThis permissionallows users to crop ShamiTech Apps wallpaper to the desired size.
24.  SetwallpaperThis permissionallows users to set a selected ShamiTech Apps image as their wallpaper.

25. Photos/Media/FilesModify or delete thecontents of your USB storage Test access to protected storage When userrecommends friends to download ShamiTech Appsby sharing to social network, we need to savean introduction picture to be shared on SD card. We won’t access other file onSD card.
26.  Device& app historyRetrieve running appsWe use thisinformation to boost your Android phone effectively, clean your device's RAMand make your phone speed up in depth.
27.  Measure appstorage spaceThis permission isused to acquire the amount of storage space used by an application.
28.  Modifysystem settingsThis permission isused in ShamiTech Apps settings, in order to switch or adjust ringtone,vibration and brightness level of the screen.
29.  Read Homesettings and shortcutsThis permission isused to acquire the user’s Home settings and shortcuts, in order to maintain userpreferences.
30.  UninstallshortcutsThis permissionallows ShamiTech Apps to delete the shortcuts created by ShamiTech Apps inother Android launchers.
31.  Draw overother appsThis permissionallows the ShamiTech Apps Free Swipe tab to be displayed as a floating windowon other apps.
32.  Read syncsettingsThis permission isused in ShamiTech Apps power’s save mode, and allows ShamiTech Appsto recognize whether sync settings are turnedon or off.
33.  Toggle syncon and offThis permission isused in ShamiTech Apps power’s save mode, and allows ShamiTech Appsto synchronize with the user's sync settings.
34. Expand/collapse status barThis permission isused for the gesture feature of ShamiTech Apps User System to expand andcollapse the status bar.
35.  InstallshortcutsThis permission isused to install shortcuts on other launchers, so users can continue to useShamiTech Apps relatedfunctions.

How we protect yourinformationWe have implementedcommercially reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect yourpersonal information from accidental loss and from loss, misuse andunauthorized access, disclosure, alteration and destruction. However, pleasenote that although we take reasonable measures to protect your information, noapp, website, Internet transmission, computer system or wireless connection iscompletely secure.

Sensitive InformationWe ask that you notsend us and also not disclose any sensitive Personal Information (e.g.,information related to political opinions, racial or ethnic origin, religion orother beliefs, health etc) on or through application, the Services or the Siteor otherwise to us. Keep safe your personal and sensitive information andstrictly we do not ask to submit.

How we share yourinformationWe may retain thirdparties to perform services on our behalf and we may collaborate with thirdparties with respect to particular products or services. These third partiesmay be provided with access to the information needed to perform theirfunctions, as long as they agree to keep the information confidential. Wereserve the right to disclose your information as required by law, when webelieve disclosure is necessary to comply with a regulatory requirement,
judicial proceeding, court order, or legal process served on us, or to protectthe safety, rights, or property of our users, the public or ShamiTech Apps .
Children's PrivacyWe are committed toprotecting the privacy of children. We do not knowingly collect personalinformation from children under the age of 13.
